title: Mission Complication
description: Generates a mission-wide hardship or twist that raises the stakes.
entries: Reinforcements come if you take too long
Someone on your side is lying about why
You must do this without your usual advantages
There is a witness you cannot afford to lose
The ground itself is against you
The target is not what you were told
A second party wants the same thing you do
You are on a clock no one warned you about
The way in is not the way out
One wrong move brings the wrong people running
The one who hired you is watching your every step
You cannot be seen doing any of it
An old debt surfaces at the worst moment
The weather turns hard against the plan
Half your information is already out of date
Someone you trust has been compromised
There are innocents in the way of every path
Your name is already known to the other side
The prize is guarded by someone you know
Failure here costs more than the mission
You have to choose which part to abandon
The rules of the place are stacked against outsiders
A rescue and a heist share the same night
Everything takes twice what you planned for
